ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "order_code" TEXT /* Order code for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., O.D., Blade Thickness) */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reorder_points" (
  "reorder_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder point */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity at which to reorder the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reorder_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorder_points_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the product was sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the customer */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_notes_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
